member.name: T:NModbus.Endian.Endianness
member.summary: Endianness of a converter

member.name: F:NModbus.Endian.Endianness.LittleEndian
member.summary: Little endian - least significant byte first

member.name: F:NModbus.Endian.Endianness.BigEndian
member.summary: Big endian - most significant byte first

member.name: M:NModbus.Endian.EndianWriter.WriteSingletonBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Only call this for the number of bytes it takes to represent a single element.

member.name: T:NModbus.Extensions.HexExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to aid in the display of binary values in hex format.

member.name: M:NModbus.Extensions.HexExtensions.ToHex(System.Byte)
member.summary: Displays a single byte in hex format (e.g. '0x0F')

member.name: M:NModbus.Extensions.StreamExtensions.TryReadBufferAsync(NModbus.Interfaces.IModbusStream,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fills the buffer from the stream.
member.returns: True if the read was successful, false if no data was returned (indiciating that the connection wsa closed).

member.name: T:NModbus.IModbusClientExtensions
member.summary: Convenient methods for calling Modbus functions on .

member.name: M:NModbus.IModbusClientExtensions.GetClientFunction``2(NModbus.Interfaces.IModbusClient,System.Byte)
member.summary: Throws an exception of the specified function isn't available.

member.summary: Provides a trivial implementation of using a func.

member.summary: The factory for serializing / deserialing the message.

member.name: T:NModbus.Helpers.BitPacker
member.summary: Utilities for packing and unpacking bits to and from byte arrays.

member.name: M:NModbus.Helpers.BitPacker.Unpack(System.Byte[],System.UInt16)
member.summary: Unpacks the specified number of bits from a byte array.

member.name: M:NModbus.Helpers.BitPacker.Pack(System.Boolean[])
member.summary: Packs the specified bits into the least possible number of bytes.

member.name: M:NModbus.Helpers.BitPacker.CalculateBytesToPackBits(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determine the number of bytes required to pack the specified number of bits in.
member.param: The total number of bits to store in a byte array.

member.name: M:NModbus.Helpers.ProtocolDataUnitFactory.CreateException(System.Byte,NModbus.Interfaces.ModbusExceptionCode)
member.summary: Creates a Modbus Exception .

member.name: T:NModbus.Messages.ModbusMessageSerializer`2
member.summary: Handles parsing/creating request and response messages.

member.name: P:NModbus.Messages.ReadReferenceRequest.FileNumber
member.summary: While it is allowed for the File Number to be in the range 1 to 0xFFFF, it should be noted that interoperability with legacy equipment may be compromised if the File Number is greater than 10 (0x0A).

member.name: P:NModbus.Messages.ReadReferenceRequest.RecordLength
member.summary: The amount of data to read.

member.name: T:NModbus.ModbusFunctionCodes
member.summary: Supported function codes

member.name: F:NModbus.ModbusFunctionCodes.ErrorMask
member.summary: Has the Most Significant Bit Set. Or this with a function code to set the error bit.

member.name: M:NModbus.ModbusFunctionCodes.SetErrorBit(System.Byte)
member.summary: Sets the error bit.

member.name: M:NModbus.ModbusFunctionCodes.RemoveErrorBit(System.Byte)
member.summary: Removes the error bit.

member.name: M:NModbus.ModbusFunctionCodes.IsErrorBitSet(System.Byte)
member.summary: Determines if the error bit is set.

member.summary: Gets the unit number of the server device.
